INGREDIENTS
Wheat flour : 2 cups
Salt : 1 tsp
Oil : 2 tbsp
Water : as needed
METHOD
1. Knead dough with water until smooth and elastic.
2. Rest the dough for thirty minutes covered.
3. Divide into balls and roll paper-thin circles.
4. Cook on inverted kadai until bubbles form.
5. Fold and serve immediately.
